fieldValues.value: A standard envelope for exchanging a Container together with its full Record set, Relations, and source references. Natural successor to `Package` at the instance layer. Likely shape: `{ container, instances[], relations[], sourceRefs[] }`. Deferred pending stabilisation of `ext:views-l2` and implementation experience.

sourceRefs.note: Imported from scds-rationale.md: "Instance graph exchange format"
